case_title: GISELLE AIKENHEAD VS. DANIEL KEE YUONG KIM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY AIKENHEAD, GISELLE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, DANIEL KEE YUONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2020 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AIKENHEAD, GISELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, DANIEL KEE YUONG $1,212.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,362.00, THE RETURN OF THE REMAINING $900.00 ON THE SECURITY DEPOSIT AND A BAD FAITH PENALTY OF 312.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF GISELLE AIKENHEAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL KEE YOUNG KIM IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 - SERVED JUL-30-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, DANIEL KEE YUONG
